messages.content: Add an FAQ section with 4 common questions people ask before starting a vending machine business.

context.title: Coffee vending for offices
context.metaDescription: Coffee vending machines for modern workplaces.

input.title: Frequently Asked Questions About Starting a Vending Business

faqItems.answer: Startup costs typically vary depending on whether you purchase new or refurbished machines and how you secure your first locations. Planning for machine acquisition, initial stock, and transport is a key first step.
faqItems.question: How much capital is needed to start a vending machine business?
How do I secure profitable locations for my machines?
faqItems.answer: Securing locations involves identifying high-foot-traffic areas such as offices, warehouses, or waiting rooms, and presenting a professional proposal to property owners or facility managers.
Operating a vending route requires regular visits to restock products, collect revenue, and perform preventative maintenance. The frequency of these visits depends heavily on sales volume.
faqItems.question: What are the ongoing maintenance and restocking requirements?
Should I start independently or buy into a franchise?
faqItems.answer: Starting independently offers maximum flexibility and lower upfront fees, while a franchise model may provide established brand recognition and training support. The choice depends on your business experience and goals.
